title: Timelord Origin (Exclusive Origin)
description: A timelord origin that integrates with many Tardis mods, and such.
body:
This origin is a classic timelord origin. That adds a special origin, that only one person in the world can have at a time. Once the origin is taken, no one else can get it until the timelord loses all 12 of there lives. Then the timelord, now dead, will no longer be able to be the timelord, ever agien. 

They also have the ability to craft all timelord technology, and no other player can craft timelord technology. However, they can use things this player has crafted. This locks all tardis tech, and such behind a exclusive origin. It intgrates with many tardis mods, and such, and adds no technology of its own.

Last of all, they can regenerate 12 times, even without the [Regeneration mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/regeneration) installed. However, it will default to the regeneration mod when it is installed, disabling the custom system. 

This has only been tested in fabric, 1.20.1. No garentees elsewhere.
